zh.Exeter, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特
zh.lifeSummary: Sarah Nott於1410年出生。她於大約1431年與James Trowbridge在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1480年享年70歲。

zh-hans.Exeter, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sarah Nott于1410年出生。她于大约1431年与James Trowbridge在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1480年享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Nott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a bald man or one who kept his hair extremely close-cropped, from Middle English nott ‘bald-headed, close-cropped’ (Old English hnott).
English: occasionally perhaps from a Middle English female personal name Note, a short form of a name such as Alinot, a pet form of Aline. See Allen .

variants.name: Knott
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Knotte, from knotte ‘knot’, related to, possibly confused with, but not historically identical with Cnut (Old Norse Knútr, Knut, originally a nickname from Old Norse knútr ‘knot’), found Latinized as Canutus.

English: nickname, perhaps for a short, thick-set person, or for a person with a prominent tumour, wart, or boil, from a transferred use of Middle English knot(te) ‘hard or firm mass, such as that formed by a knot tied in a string’.

variants.name: Notman
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Middle English note-man ‘nut-seller’.
English: occupational name denoting ‘servant of Nott’ (see Nott ), with Middle English man ‘man, servant’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a poor man, from German Not ‘need, want’ + Mann (Yiddish man) ‘man’.

variants.name: Notte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Dante, Angelo, Benedetto, Luigi, Nicola, Quido, Rocco, Serafino.
Italian: from a short form of the personal name Bonanotte, from buona ‘good’ + notte ‘night’, bestowed with reference to the time of birth.
French (also Notté): occupational name for a choral singer, from notter ‘to sing’.

variants.name: Nutting
meanings: English (Midlands): from Middle English notting ‘bald-headed person’ (Old English hnotting). Compare Nott .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Nott was born in 1410. She married James Trowbridge about 1431, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1480, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Sarah Nott est née en 1410. Elle a épousé James Trowbridge environ 1431, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1480, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sarah Nott wurde 1410 geboren. Sie hat um 1431 in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom James Trowbridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1480 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Sarah Nott è nata il nel 1410. Lei sposato James Trowbridge circa 1431, nel Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1480, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.Exeter, Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボンエクセター
ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Nottは1410年に生まれた。約1431年にイギリスイギリスデボンエクセターでJames Trowbridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1480年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Nott(은)는 1410년 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 James Trowbridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Exeter, Devon, England: Exeter, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Sarah Nott nasceu em 1410. Ela casou-se com James Trowbridge aproximadamente 1431, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1480, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Nott родилась в 1410 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Trowbridge около 1431 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1480 г. в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sarah Nott nació en 1410. Se casó con James Trowbridge aproximadamente 1431, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1480, a la edad de 70 años.
